title: Automatically display board data by quarters

posts.author: eranggg (eran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I want to present a boards data based on quarters. Is it possible?

For example - can I create a board that displays data for Quarter 1 and when the quarter changes, the dashboard will automatically display data for Quarter 2?

Thanks in advance

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Eran,

In order to display the data based on the quarter, you would need to ensure the dates are set up in the board to then allow you to filter in the dashboard (or board) between the dates of the quarter:

That said, I am afraid this process remains a manual one and cannot be automated at this time. This is great feedback that I am happy to share with our team internally
